name: Special Club Sandwich
recipeIngredient: 1 package Miracle Whip or Miracle Whipped Dressing
2 slices Kraft Natural Sharp Cheddar Cheese
1 package Oscar Mayer Deli-Thin Roast Meat
2 slices Kraft Natural Swiss Cheese, cut in half
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread 3 toasted bread slices with Miracle Whip dressing.
2. Place a slice of cheddar cheese on one toast slice.
3. Add roast meat and lettuce to the cheese slice.
4. Top with another toast slice.
5. Add sliced Swiss cheese, tomato, and bacon on top of the second toast slice.
6. Cover with a third toasted bread slice.
7. Cut each sandwich into quarters using a sharp knife or mandoline.
8. Secure each quarter with toothpicks.
Makes 4 sandwiches.
